svg.title: User journey hierarchy mapped to URL structure and backend services
svg.desc: Four-level hierarchy: landing, domain section, sub-topic, project demo. Each level shown with its URL, what the user does, and what serves it on the backend.
svg.text: User journey → URL hierarchy → backend service
Each level narrows intent. Each URL pattern maps to a different kind of content.

g.text: What is it, theory, why it
where it lives in the URL tree.
